overview.description: The ProShares Ultra MSCI Japan (EZJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Japan index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to the MSCI Japan Index, a market-cap-weighted index which covers approximately 85% of the float-adjusted market cap of the Japanese equity market. EZJ was launched on Jun 4, 2009 and is issued by ProShares.
